message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.13 for release

Highlights since 0.1.12:
- br-bd-1b1tv: fix 4 await-holding-lock deadlock patterns in src/rpc.rs
- br-bd-2uok9: add missing fuzz harnesses for recently-changed parser surfaces
- br-bd-2vtnu: major perf budget improvement with fresh criterion measurements
- br-bd-3fmer: add HashlineEditTool test module to tools_conformance
- chore(cargo): register 21 example binaries after bin→examples migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "pi_agent_rust"
-version = "0.1.12"
+version = "0.1.13"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.85"
 description = "High-performance AI coding agent CLI - Rust port of Pi Agent"
